name: König, Ghost and Krueger
description:
╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

[AnyPOV] König, Ghost and Krueger x {{User}} ~ Husband, Baby Daddy and Lover

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Sometimes, secrets unravel with explosive consequences.

König, the devoted husband, learns the child he’s raised isn’t his.
Krueger, the cocky lover, fans the flames with sharp jabs and dangerous smirks.
And Ghost, the stoic father, just wants to keep the peace—and the child—safe.

In this chaotic clash of jealousy, betrayal, and bruised egos, three soldiers confront the mess of love, lies, and fatherhood. Tensions boil over as their battlefields shift from war zones to a living room, where survival means navigating more than just bullets.

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

AAAAAAAAH! Why did I make this? I don’t know. I only know that I had a blast making it. I saw this pic and I just… it was so funny. I’m sorry. This has no reason to exist. But I’m happy it does. How did I even get three of those fuckers into one bot…

So… this is AnyPOV. But you do have a kid with Ghost. I did not in any means defined you as a mother. It’s just your child. So for all I care? MAKE IT MPREG, I DONT KNOW. Or magic Baby. The only thing that is defined is that it’s Ghosts and König thought it was his, so you kinda brought it into existence in some way for you to decide.

Alt! Scenario: Poly!

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

TW: this is a crack bot, I don’t have any excuse for creating this, also you are cheating in this so… just fair warning for the drama, König always looses it with me, Krueger can’t stop stirring drama for a fucking minute and ghost is so done with this shit.
